free_text: Systematics of proton absorption deduced from (p,p)
and (p,n) cross sectiopns for 2.0- to 6.7-MeV protons
on 107,109Ag and 115In
6.5-mV CN electrostatic accelerator.
Corrected for background and dead time.
Data taken from PAPS PRVCA-21-896-8.
VM
Target enriched to 98.54% 107Ag, deposited on glass
slides coated with a thin layer of NaCl.  Areal
density 1 mg/cm2.
8 BF3 counters embedded in polyethylene sphere.
Statistical uncertainty.
Detailed error estimates given in Table II of article.
Target enriched to 99.26% 109Ag, deposited on glass
slides coated with a thin layer of NaCl.  Areal
density 1 mg/cm2.
8 BF3 counters embedded in polyethylene sphere.
Statistical uncertainty.
Detailed error estimates given in Table II of article.
Natural indium target, deposited on glass slides
coated with a thin layer of NaCl.  Areal density
1 mg/cm2.
8 BF3 counters embedded in polyethylene sphere.
Statistical uncertainty.
Detailed error estimates given in Table II of article.

slides coated with a thin layer of NaCl.  Areal
density 1 mg/cm2.
Scattering chamber.
Statistical uncertainty always less than 0.5%.
